message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FEFEFE

package "«aggregate» Product" {
  class "Product" as Prod_C <<C>>
  class "ShortDescription" as SD_C <<C>>
  class "LongDescription" as LD_C <<C>>
  class "TechnicalDescription" as TD_C <<C>>
  class "Barcode" as Bar_C <<C>>
  class "ProductionCode" as PC_C <<C>>
  class "PriceWithoutVAT" as PwoV_C <<C>>
  class "PriceWithVAT" as PwV_C <<C>>
  class "Reference" as Ref_C <<C>>
  class "Weight" as Wei_C <<C>>
  class "Volume" as Vol_C <<C>>
  class "Photo" as Pho_C <<C>>
  class "BrandName" as BN_C <<C>>
}

package "«aggregate» Category" {
  class "Category" as Cat_C <<C>>
  class "AlphanumericCode" as ANC_C <<C>>
  class "Description" as Desc_C <<C>>
  class "SuperCategory" as SC_C <<C>>
}

class "Product" as Product <<entity>>\n<<root>> {
  -uniqueInternalCode
}

class "ShortDescription" as ShortDesc <<value object>>
class "LongDescription" as LongDesc <<value object>>
class "TechnicalDescription" as TechDesc <<value object>>
class "Barcode" as Barcode <<value object>>
class "ProductionCode" as ProdCode <<value object>>
class "PriceWithoutVAT" as PriceWoVAT <<value object>>
class "PriceWithVAT" as PriceWVAT <<value object>>
class "Reference" as Reference <<value object>>
class "Weight" as Weight <<value object>>
class "Volume" as Volume <<value object>>
class "Photo" as Photo <<value object>>
class "BrandName" as BrandName <<value object>>

class "Category" as Category <<entity>>\n<<root>>
class "AlphanumericCode" as AlphaCode <<value object>>
class "Description" as Description <<value object>>
class "SuperCategory" as SuperCat <<value object>>

Product "1" --> "1" ShortDesc : characterized by
Product "1" --> "1" LongDesc : characterized by
Product "1" --> "1" TechDesc : characterized by
Product "1" --> "1" Barcode : identified by
Product "1" --> "1" ProdCode : identified by
Product "1" --> "0..1" PriceWoVAT : associated
Product "1" --> "1" PriceWVAT : associated
Product "1" --> "1" Reference : identified by
Product "1" --> "1" Weight : characterized by
Product "1" --> "1" Volume : characterized by
Product "1" --> "1" Photo : described
Product "1" --> "1" BrandName : made by
Product "1" --> "1" Category : organized by

Category "1" --> "1" AlphaCode : identified by
Category "1" --> "0..1" Description : characterized by
Category "1" --> "1" SuperCat : belongs to

@enduml
```
